word: G3654 - ὅλως - hólōs - hol'-oce - At all

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὅλως

- Transliteration: Holos

- Phonetic: hol'-oce

- Definition:

1. wholly, altogether

- Origin: from G3650

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Adverb from G3650; completely that is altogether; (by analogy) everywhere; (negative) not by any means: - at all commonly utterly.
